fields.title: task tool: return worker output to caller
fields.description: Fix task tool so the LLM receives actual text content (last assistant message or last tool result) as the tool result. Stop returning content blocks of type 'json' (they are not passed through). Include session_id in returned text for continuation.
fields.close_reason: task tool now returns text tool result (last assistant or tool output) and includes session_id; stopped returning json blocks
